title: Copilot FinOps budget policies (v1)
description: Schema for config/budget-policies*.yml. Validates structure, types, and enums only. Cross-field semantic rules (e.g. universal/team hard-stop, cost_center requires target.cost_center, team requires a source, name->ID resolution, and anything needing live GitHub data) are enforced by scripts/validate-config.sh and the apply script, not here.

version.description: Config contract version. Optional; defaults to 1 when omitted. Each version has a frozen schema under schemas/v<N>/, so v1 configs keep validating against this file even after the contract evolves.

enterprise_slug.description: GitHub Enterprise slug. Optional here; may instead be passed via --enterprise-slug or the workflow input.

api.description: Advanced REST endpoint overrides. Leave unset for github.com; only set when proxying the GitHub API. Not shown in example configs by convention.

budget_policies.description: List of budget policies to reconcile. May be empty for a safe no-op config.

name.description: Local label used in logs and the --policy-name filter. Never sent to the API.

type.description: Budget policy type. enterprise -> enterprise scope; universal -> every licensed user (multi_user_customer); cost_center -> one cost center; team -> materialized from a team's membership (see coverage).

coverage.description: Only meaningful for type: team. total_spend (default) caps shared pool + additional via one user budget per member (always hard-stop). additional_spend caps collective metered spend via a single cost center budget.

source.description: Team source. Required for type: team (enforced by validate-config.sh). Provide team_slug plus exactly one of org or enterprise.

org.description: Organization login for an org team source.

enterprise.description: Enterprise slug for an enterprise team source.

target.description: Budget target. Required for type: cost_center. Optional for type: team coverage: additional_spend (auto-derived/created when omitted).

cost_center.description: Cost center name (resolved to its ID at apply time and sent as budget_entity_name).

amount.description: Budget cap in whole USD. Maps to budget_amount.

prevent_further_usage.description: Hard-stop usage at the cap. Optional; defaults to true. Must stay true for universal and team coverage: total_spend (enforced by validate-config.sh).

product_sku.description: Billing product SKU. Optional; defaults to ai_credits (the Copilot metered SKU). budget_type is derived from this (ai_credits -> BundlePricing, otherwise ProductPricing). Omit for normal Copilot AI-credit budgets.

type.description: Explicit budget_type override. Optional and rarely needed; normally derived from product_sku. Valid values: BundlePricing, ProductPricing.

will_alert.description: Emit budget alerts. Optional; defaults to false.

alert_recipients.description: Logins to notify. Optional; defaults to an empty list.
